last_assistant_message:
The changes are already committed in the HEAD commit (the prior "update all import paths" task already included these files). The work is complete and clean.

**Summary:**

Task 15 is complete. All 6 example `package.json` files and their associated `package-lock.json` files have been updated.

**Files changed:**

- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/custom-provider-anthropic/package.json` - name: `dg-claw-extension-custom-provider-anthropic`
- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/custom-provider-anthropic/package-lock.json` - name updated to match
- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/custom-provider-gitlab-duo/package.json` - name: `dg-claw-extension-custom-provider-gitlab-duo`
- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/custom-provider-qwen-cli/package.json` - name: `dg-claw-extension-custom-provider-qwen-cli`
- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/sandbox/package.json` - name: `dg-claw-extension-sandbox`
- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/sandbox/package-lock.json` - name updated to match
- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/with-deps/package.json` - name: `dg-claw-extension-with-deps`
- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/with-deps/package-lock.json` - name updated to match
- `/c/dev/myclaw/packages/web-ui/example/package.json` - name: `dg-claw-web-ui-example`, replaced `@mariozechner/pi-ai` -> `@dg-claw/ai` and `@mariozechner/pi-web-ui` -> `@dg-claw/web-ui`

**Verification:** Zero remaining `@mariozechner/pi-` or `pi-extension-` / `pi-web-ui-example` references in any `package.json` or `package-lock.json` under `packages/`.

**Commit status:** All changes are already included in the prior HEAD commit (`f574fe1` - "chore: update all import paths from @mariozechner/pi-* to @dg-claw/*"). No separate commit was needed as the git diff vs HEAD shows no outstanding changes.
